overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Death Stranding showing the protagonist jogging along a desolate highway at night during a storm. The character moves from rocky wilderness onto a paved road illuminated by futuristic cyan street lights while carrying a large backpack.

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the distant clouds on the right side
character steps from rocky terrain onto the paved highway surface

agents.ego_description: moving steadily from rough wilderness terrain onto the paved road, heading toward the distant lights

entered.detail: dark uneven rocky ground with scattered boulders
silhouetted mountain against the night sky
bright moon partially obscured by storm clouds
dark turbulent clouds covering the sky
smooth asphalt road with white markings appearing at the end of the segment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark rocky wilderness under a stormy night sky with a bright moon. A lightning strike flashes in the distance as the character moves forward, transitioning from rough terrain onto a paved highway.

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the center of the highway, passing under curved street lights

entered.detail: tall curved pole with bright cyan LED strip and blue glowing base
rocky embankment alongside the paved road

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along the paved highway illuminated by futuristic cyan street lights. The rocky wilderness falls behind as the road stretches forward, bordered by rocky shoulders and distant glowing structures on the horizon.

events.description: character slows slightly and turns head to survey surroundings while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while cautiously scanning the environment and checking flanks

entered.detail: faint blue light emanating from structures on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues jogging along the highway, passing more street lights that now appear on both sides of the road. At around 16 seconds, the character glances around cautiously before resuming the forward journey toward the distant horizon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, stormy wilderness onto a futuristic highway illuminated by cyan light. It begins in a rocky landscape under a bright moon, where a distant flash of lightning signals the transition as the character moves from the rough terrain onto a paved road. As the character jogs forward, the wilderness recedes and the environment shifts into a structured corridor of glowing street lights and rocky shoulders. The scene then expands to show lights lining both sides of the highway, with the character glancing around cautiously before continuing toward a distant glow on the horizon.
